regime_hint.notes: NIFTY closed 23,649.95 (flat session). Daily regime read TREND_DOWN but ATR 1.47% (LOW vol) and SGX Nifty +0.19% (~23,669) imply a flat-to-mild gap-up open — treating as RANGING/LOW for plan purposes per W19 lesson (default RANGING unless robust directional catalyst). US mixed overnight: SPX -0.07%, NDQ -0.51% (Nvidia softness), DOW +0.32%. Asia mixed (Nikkei -0.06%, HSI +0.07%). USD/INR 96.36 +0.23% (IT exporter tailwind). Brent $109.32 -2.48% (positive for India macro; Iran risk lingering). FII +Rs 2,814 cr, DII +Rs 2,682 cr on May 18 — both buyers. RBI scrapped IFR for banks (May 18) — mild positive for bank flexibility. VIX API null — assume NORMAL. Recheck regime at 09:45 (W18 lesson — pre-market regime missed 3/4 intraday reversals; if NIFTY within 0.3% of prior close by then, demote to RANGING-flat).

watchlist.notes: Top scanner score 2.85. Strong positive: Q4 beat, 50% dividend hike, Airtel Africa stake swap (Rs 28,222 cr), Jefferies target Rs 2,350. Citi Pan-Asia conf May 18-19 (mild speculation risk). Lean long but `both` per W19. Watch wide-ORB (>2%) auto-exclude.
Scanner #4 (2.70). No event today, Q4 already announced, AGM Jul. Gap -0.59% (within noise). Tradeable both sides on 2+ confirmation. Auto-exclude if ORB >2%.
IT tailwind: USD/INR 96.36 weak. Analyst buy note today @1,142 → 1,177 target. UKG Aspire EMEA + Citi/GS investor conferences May 19-20 (mild risk, no PSI per disclosure). Flat gap.
Realty. Q4 announced May 14 (net profit Rs 4,415 cr FY26, Rs 8 dividend). Stock weak post-result (-3.3% May 14). No event today. Gap -1.06%.
Metals proxy. Top-3 scanner score (2.80). No event today (Q4 board meet was May 15, already past). Gap -0.21%. Sole metals representation given TATASTEEL wide gap (-2.69% auto-exclude).

Sole bank in plan (per W19: max one bank). RBI IFR discontinuation (May 18) is mild bank tailwind. Gap -1.11%. No event today. Watch VWAP closely — TCS+HDFCBANK bias bug recurrence (#lesson 2026-05-08).
Energy. Crude -2.48% mixed for RELI (refining margins +, upstream -). Q4 PAT downgrade overhang from May 11-12 still in price. No event today. Gap -0.18%. Low conviction — let intraday tape decide.

IT macro positive (USD/INR weak, US Dow up) but stock-specific negative: salary-cut headlines, performance-band classification controversy (lowest 5% Band D), 23k FY26 job cuts. Lower conviction than INFY. Tradeable both — let price action arbitrate.

rationale: 8-symbol watchlist with all `both` bias per #lesson 2026-W19 (default-both unless catalyst is robust to intraday tape). One IT pair (INFY, TCS), one bank (HDFCBANK only — W19 single-bank rule), one telecom (BHARTIARTL — strongest catalyst), one energy (RELIANCE, low conviction), one power (TATAPOWER), one realty (DLF), one metals (SAIL). Hard avoids: BPCL (Q4 board meet today + trading window closed until May 21 — binary event, #lesson 2026-04-30), HCLTECH (52-week lows, MarketsMojo Sell, -22% 3-month, bearish put activity — strong technical weakness), ADANIENT (no fresh catalyst + history of SL gap-through and same-stock re-entry from W18/W19 lessons), PNB/ETERNAL/BANKBARODA (outside NIFTY 50 allowlist, #lesson 2026-05-05), TATASTEEL (gap -2.69% wide auto-exclude). Risk tightened to 1.0% per trade / max 2 open positions given (a) paper drawdown ~3.86% from start, (b) Iran geopolitical overhang, (c) tape direction unclear (SGX +0.19% but US mixed, NDQ weak), (d) Friday's 0-win 4-loss session is fresh. MAX_TRADES_PER_DAY stays at settings default (7 paper) — not overridable. Expect lunch lull 12:00-13:30; best setups before 11:30 or after 13:30. SGX gap-up may fade — apply 09:45 VWAP recheck (#lesson 2026-05-07). Strict 2+ confirmation required everywhere (#lesson 2026-W19).
lessons_applied: #lesson 2026-W19 (promoted): Default to `bias: both` unless catalyst is robust to intraday price action — all 8 names set to both.
#lesson 2026-W19 (promoted): On big-bank-print days keep at most one bank in the watchlist — only HDFCBANK included; no banking-cluster prints today but kept single-bank discipline.
#lesson 2026-W19 (promoted): 2+ confirmation rule applies unconditionally regardless of score — high-conviction bypass tightened in code on 2026-05-11.
#lesson 2026-04-30: Binary-event stocks must be excluded entirely, not just flagged — BPCL (Q4 board meet today + trading window closed) hard-excluded.
#lesson 2026-05-05: Scanner can pick stocks outside the defined NIFTY 50 universe — PNB, ETERNAL, BANKBARODA excluded despite ranking inside top 20.
#lesson 2026-05-04: Wide-ORB (>2%) stocks must auto-exclude — TATASTEEL excluded (gap -2.69%).
#lesson 2026-05-07: SGX gap framing can fade — rationale includes 09:45 VWAP recheck and demote-to-RANGING-flat instruction if NIFTY within 0.3% of prior close.
#lesson 2026-W18 (promoted): R:R + risk-cap discipline is the strongest guardrail — risk tightened to 1.0%/2 open given fresh drawdown.
#lesson 2026-05-08: Bias-invalidation conditions not enforced in code — defaulted to `both` rather than directional bias I cannot reliably invalidate intraday.
